message:
fix: correct two bugs in previous audit fixes

- resolveSafeChildPath: check for ".." + sep instead of bare ".."
  prefix to avoid false-positive rejection of filenames like "..config"
- roadmap API: convert empty status filter to undefined so invalid
  query params return all results instead of zero results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
